allow_instructions: This is a static marketing site (HTML/CSS/JS) deployed via GitHub Pages. Auto-approve all normal site edits, git commits, and pushes to origin/main or the Pages branch.
Allow git status, diff, add, commit, push, fetch, pull, merge, checkout, branch, log, and remote commands for this repo.
Allow reading, writing, and deleting project files under the workspace, including content assets and CSS/JS/HTML.
Allow PowerShell inspection commands used while editing this site (Get-ChildItem, Get-Content, Test-Path, Select-String, Invoke-WebRequest for the live site).
Allow cache-busting and deploy-related changes without asking.
block_instructions: Still ask before force-pushing, hard resets, or rewriting git history.
Still ask before changing git config or deleting the entire repository.
